MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-582003 WITH CASE CGC-20-585348
Off Calendar Dec-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS BOGDAN DAHDOUH AND THOMAS DAHDOUH'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NO. CGC-20-582003 WITH CASE NO. CGC-20-585348.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted per plaintiff's statement of non-opposition in Ho v. Dahdouh, No. 582003, which shall be the lead action.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Feb-24-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
